title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, May 05 2026
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Older Panamaxes have come up this week following a flurry of recently sold vessels. Panamax BC Donousa (76,400 DWT, Jun 2004, Tsuneishi Zosen) sold by Dileton Maritime for USD 9.3 mil, VV Value USD 8.7 mil. Ultramax Amstel Tiger (60,500 DWT, Aug 2016, Oshima) sold by Triton Navigation SS/DD Due for USD 27.8 mil, VV Value USD 28.2 mil.
